title: Pyrus pyrrhula

uses: Pyrus pyrrhula, also known as the Asian pear, has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The fruit, leaves, and bark of the plant have been utilized to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
